summary: Capsule excellently captures the Stripe 429 rate-limit cascade from latency warnings through retry exhaustion, DLQ overflow, and final alert firing, correctly omitting recurring invalid-card-format distractors; the service restart boundary gap and report_gen queue state are not reported.
improvements: Note the 'PaymentService started' log at 09:00:00 (line 121) as a context event — the 1-hour gap and fresh startup suggest a prior restart or deployment that may have triggered the Stripe rate-limit spike and is important context for the post-mortem
Include the 'health check degraded' line (line 149) explicitly in evidence to confirm the service health endpoint was impacted, completing the blast-radius picture for an on-call engineer
